description:
Parent epic: V3 E8: Observability standards

Source task 1/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Audit emitted telemetry and trace metadata.

Epic closure criteria:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Completed an emitted telemetry/trace metadata audit. Standardized lifecycle trace helpers to lift correlation refs from available runtime context while preserving explicit request/agent/conversation fields, including credentials, guardrails/hooks, memory, output, workflow, subagent, handoff, MCP, and session-backed schedules. Updated trace normalization to preserve non-nil top-level fields over nested refs. Added regression assertions for real lifecycle traces carrying session/conversation/context refs. Verified with format, compile, full tests, docs warnings-as-errors, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E8: Audit emitted telemetry and trace metadata
